title: Sexual Dimorphism Explained
script_summary: A concise, scientifically accurate explanation of sexual dimorphism revealing its complexities.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you that your body is a canvas of evolution?
Sexual dimorphism is the striking difference between male and female species.
Think size, color, and even behavior. But it’s not as clear-cut as it seems.
In some species, females are larger; in others, males boast vibrant colors.
Each trait serves a survival purpose, but not all are fully understood.
Curious about more? Hit follow and dive deeper into the wonders of biology!
